role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Indonesian vocabulary ('Bensin', 'Pertalite') and script usage.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil color (laterite), and settlement patterns consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed tropical broadleaf vegetation and palms, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road signs, fuel station types ('POM MINI'), and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles (warungs, corrugated roofs) and vehicle types (underbone motorcycles) as cross-domain indicators.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic and regulatory agents provided definitive, image-grounded evidence ('Pertalite', 'POM MINI') that uniquely identified Indonesia. The tournament correctly used this evidence to eliminate all other candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Text on signs matches the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Red soil and tropical vegetation accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Vegetation type correctly identified as tropical.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Signage and road features accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Architectural and vehicle details match the image.
